description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly gray body accented by black and orange highlights. The stock is geometric and solid, leading into a pistol-style grip and a squared trigger guard. The barrel assembly is thick and blocky, with three distinct muzzle ports visible at the front, each surrounded by orange rings, suggesting a multi-barrel or clustered configuration. The top of the weapon has a raised rail or sighting system, and the sides are adorned with linear orange detailing and paneling. The overall construction appears to be metallic, with a matte finish and minimal surface texturing, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. The shotgun's proportions and features suggest it is designed for heavy-duty use in urban environments.
description: A modern, angular shotgun with a gray, black, and orange color scheme, featuring a blocky multi-port barrel and a pistol grip. Its industrial design is accented by geometric lines and a sturdy stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, angular stock, pistol grip, and detailed orange and black paneling.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three orange-ringed barrel ports and the weapon's wide, blocky muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same geometric features, with visible panel lines and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the squared stock end and the alignment of the top rail and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: triple-barrel, clustered configuration with three parallel muzzles visible at the front
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rectangular, squared trigger guard with a flat profile and no visible finger grooves
